info.title: Mark-a-Spot API
info.description:
Custom REST API endpoints for Mark-a-Spot citizen reporting platform.

For JSON:API endpoints (CRUD operations on entities), see the auto-generated
JSON:API documentation.

For Open311 GeoReport v2 standard endpoints, see openapi-open311.yaml

post.description: Sends a one-time code to the user's email for passwordless login
Validates the one-time code and creates a session

get.description: Returns count of service requests per status
Returns count of service requests per category
Returns category stats with parent/child relationships
Returns key performance indicators for dashboard

get.summary: Get duplicate matches for a node
Get sentiment analysis for a node

get.description: Returns reports with negative sentiment for prioritization

post.summary: Queue missing items for AI processing

get.description: Returns theme, features, and configuration for the frontend
Returns field configuration for a specific form mode
Returns allowed values for a field (e.g., list fields)

get.summary: Get vote sum for a service request

AcceptLanguage.name: Accept-Language
AcceptLanguage.description: Preferred language for response content (de, en, nl, etc.)
